response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack and DLang developer but completely lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience on Windows. Furthermore, they do not possess the required Capital Markets or Fixed Income domain expertise, nor the specific SQL Server or Oracle database experience required for this role.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience (10+ years) across multiple stacks and architectures.
Strong background in CI/CD pipelines, DevOps, and test-driven development (TDD), which are desirable skills.
Some exposure to the financial sector through a previous role at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Severely lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience, with only 7 months of professional C/C++ experience listed.
No demonstrated experience with Windows platform development or enterprise SQL Server/Oracle databases.
Lacks the mandatory domain expertise in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income.
